question: Show every MLB game scored before the qualifying-leg filter was applied.

mlbAllGamesSignalRows.matchup: Milwaukee Brewers at St. Louis Cardinals
Arizona Diamondbacks at San Diego Padres
Los Angeles Angels at Texas Rangers
Boston Red Sox at Chicago White Sox
Colorado Rockies at San Francisco Giants
Kansas City Royals at New York Mets
New York Yankees at Tampa Bay Rays

pull.message: This GitHub proof does not create PULLS snapshots. It reads AWS EventBridge-generated 15-minute pull history from DynamoDB.

predictions.reason: Single-game MLB moneyline pick ranked by de-vigged book probability, real bettable price, EV, edge, line movement, book agreement, reversals, and guardrails.

fundamentalsLayer.message: No verified MLB fundamentals package matched this game. Market signal remains primary.

calibration.note: Calibration intentionally compresses aggressive raw scores toward market consensus and penalizes instability.

pickDiscipline.rule: Every game can receive a prediction, but only rows passing this gate are actionable picks.

rules: All predictions for the slate lock together 45 minutes before the first game begins.
After lock, later pulls may continue for audit but cannot change picks.
Locked scoring uses only pulls captured at or before the lock timestamp.

winnerStackV2.policy: Every game receives a locked prediction; only actionablePick=true rows are primary picks.

rules: All MLB predictions for the slate lock together 45 minutes before the first game begins.
Once the slate is locked, later 15-minute pulls do not change any game-winner prediction on that slate.
Locked predictions are scored from pull history captured at or before the slate lock timestamp.

reversal.auditUse: Compare count, density, and size proxy against eventual winning team after final score settlement.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.
rolling24hAccuracyTarget.calibrationPolicy: Market-first probabilities, false-confirmation shrinkage, and limited actionable promotion only for clean market-confirmed leans.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Non-official predictions are displayed at the daily slate lock.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.
accuracyTarget.calibrationPolicy: Market-first probabilities, false-confirmation shrinkage, and limited actionable promotion only for clean market-confirmed leans.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Non-official predictions are displayed at the daily slate lock.

calibrationPolicy.note: Probabilities are compressed toward market consensus and penalized for instability before the no-pick gate is applied.

rules: All predictions for the slate lock together 45 minutes before the first game begins.
After lock, later pulls may continue for audit but cannot change picks.
Locked scoring uses only pulls captured at or before the lock timestamp.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Non-official predictions are displayed at the daily slate lock.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

mlbB10Build.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default
mlbB10Build.message: MLB-B1.0 refused because frozen same-slate history did not produce 2 MLB_STRONG plus 1 MLB_LEAN/STRONG. The 2-hour slate build deadline has already passed.
mlbB10Build.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.

mlbLatestBuild.message: Built after 12 snapshots from top available ranked signals. Leg grades remain honest and are not promoted to strong.

results.message: Built after 12 snapshots from top available ranked signals. Leg grades remain honest and are not promoted to strong.

pullCoverage.policy: All active same-day sports should start timestamped pulls at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

results.message: Refused because the 3-leg build must be created no later than 2 hours before the first game or match.

results.message: Cannot build a three-leg parlay without three unique games or matches.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
